title: collomia debilis f. hurdei
intro: Collomia debilis f. hurdei, also known as the slender collomia, is a perennial wildflower that belongs to the plantain family and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Collomia debilis f. hurdei include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and promote skin healing, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and its leaves and flowers can be dried for later use in herbal remedies.
